user_message_snippet: Write me a numbered list of 3 code examples: 1) Hello World in Python, 2) Hello World in JavaScript, 3) Hello World in Bash. Show each as a code block.

preprocessing.title: Hello World code examples
preprocessing.chat_summary: User requests Hello World examples in Python, JavaScript, and Bash.
